data.title: Elizabeth Warren Slams SEC Chair Nominee for Potential Crypto 'Pre-Bribe'
data.description:
The senator, a noted crypto skeptic, has raised conflict of interest concerns toward stablecoin legislation as well.
source: https://decrypt.co/311992/elizabeth-warren-slams-sec-chair-nominee

data.title: Wyoming Stablecoin Is Just a State-Issued CBDC by Another Name: Rep. Tom Emmer
data.description:
The GOP Majority Whip said he’s “vehemently against” the project and any other attempt by a state, Republican-led or not, to issue a tokenized version of its currency.
source: https://decrypt.co/311969/wyoming-stablecoin-cbdc-another-name-emmer

data.title: YZi Labs announces the launch of AI and blockchain global hackathon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: YZi Labs announced the launch of the AI ​​and blockchain global hackathon. It is reported that the offline hackathon will be held at AGI House in the San Francisco Bay Area on April 12, 2025, and the online hackathon will be held in cooperation with its investment portfolio DoraHacks from April 13 to 27.

data.title: The U.S. Senate Banking Committee will vote on Paul Atkins and other nominees on a specific date to be determined
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett posted on the X platform that according to a US Senate aide, the Senate Banking Committee will not vote on Paul Atkins or other nominees today, which is customary. Nominees will be asked to answer questions submitted for the record before voting. The vote will be held later, and the specific date is to be determined.

data.title: Senate Banking Committee Delays Vote on Nominees
data.description: According to Odaily, crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett reported on the X platform that the U.S. Senate Banking Committee will not hold a vote today on Paul Atkins or other nominees, as is customary. Nominees are required to answer submitted record questions before the vote takes place. The voting will be conducted at a later date, which has yet to be determined.

data.title: Coinbase announces open source MPC crypto library
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, Coinbase announced the open source of the MPC encryption library. It is reported that this technology has helped to protect Coinbase assets, but by making it open source, the security standards of the entire industry can be improved.

data.title: Hyperliquid: ETH deposits, withdrawals and spot trading are now online
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hyperliquid posted on the X platform that ETH deposits, withdrawals and spot trading are now online.

data.title: Taproot Wizards: All remaining NFTs have been sold out, and distribution of Taproot Wizards to minters is expected to begin in the next 24 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin NFT project Taproot Wizards posted on the X platform: "All remaining Taproot Wizards have been sold out, and the final settlement price is 0.31BTC. It is expected that Taproot Wizards will be distributed to minters within the next 24 hours."

data.title: Tether's cross-chain stablecoin USDT0 has been deployed to the Optimism Superchain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Tether's cross-chain stablecoin USDT0 has been deployed to Optimism Superchain. Optimism announced that USDT0 is now available on the OP mainnet. Superchain is a second-layer chain network that aims to expand Ethereum through Optimism's OP Stack. The deployment of USDT0 is expected to drive Superchain to attract more top assets, applications and partners to join. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Coinbase International will launch BNB perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase International Exchange and Coinbase Advanced will launch BNB perpetual contracts. The BNB-PERP market will open on or after 9:30 am (UTC) on April 3, 2025.
